markdown:
#  Edit a Purchase Order (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To edit a purchase order or subcontract:_
      * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-android)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Tap the **Purchase Order** you want to edit.
  3. Tap the **Edit**   
![Commitments Android Edit Purchase Order](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a617eae013fbc35d40f107020f242e83/43741ac867fc625f7628c9e69072f885/commitments-android-edit-purchase-order.png?fm=webp)
  4. Tap into a field to edit the relevant information. To learn about the fields you can edit, see [Create a Purchase Order (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order-android).
  5. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/edit-a-commitments-schedule-of-values-android)
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Commitments (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/permissions)
title: Edit a Purchase Order (Android)
description: How to edit an existing purchase order in the Commitments tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
